title: Project Report: Web App Security Assessment — Cybersecurity Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: OWASP Top 10 assessment of a demo web app: ZAP scan, manual testing, remediation report.
objectives: Manual test for auth and injection
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Web App Security Assessment** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Cybersecurity Analyst. Duration: 3–4 weeks. OWASP Top 10 assessment of a demo web app: ZAP scan, manual testing, remediation report. Tools: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite Community, Browser devtools.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: OWASP ZAP automated scan
Objective: Manual test for auth and injection
Objective: Risk-rated findings report
Objective: Remediation recommendations with priority
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Cybersecurity Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Cybersecurity Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Cybersecurity Analyst resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Manual
chapters.content:

- [ ] XSS
- [ ] Auth bypass

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: ZAP report; Manual test log; Assessment report PDF. Skills demonstrated: OWASP, Pen testing, Reporting. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: ZAP report
Deliverable: Manual test log
Deliverable: Assessment report PDF
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits ZAP report and passes the rubric.
